languages.text: "Они взяли группу разведчиков и отправились к руинам ксеносов. Думаю, решили атаковать их базу".
"They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."
languages.original_text: "Они взяли группу разведчиков и отправились к руинам ксеносов. Думаю, решили атаковать их базу".

traits.locale_text: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I believe they've decided to strike their base."
"They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I believe they've decided to strike their base."
"They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."
"They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."

languages.text: “他们带了一队侦察兵，往那片异形遗迹去了。我想他们是打算直接端掉它们的老巢。”
languages.original_text: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."

traits.locale_text: “他们带了一队侦察兵，往那片异形遗迹去了。我想他们是打算直接端掉它们的老巢。”

languages.text: "Bir grup keşifçiyle zeno harabelerine yöneldiler. Sanırım üslerine saldırmaya karar verdiler."
languages.original_text: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."

traits.locale_text: "Bir grup keşifçiyle zeno harabelerine yöneldiler. Sanırım üslerine saldırmaya karar verdiler."

languages.text: « Ils sont partis pour les xénoruines avec un groupe d'éclaireurs. Je crois qu'ils ont décidé d'attaquer directement la base de ces créatures. »
languages.original_text: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."

traits.locale_text: « Ils sont partis pour les xénoruines avec un groupe d'éclaireurs. Je crois qu'ils ont décidé d'attaquer directement la base de ces créatures. »

languages.text: «Se han llevado a un grupo de exploradores hacia las xenoruinas. Creo que han decidido atacar su base».
languages.original_text: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."

traits.locale_text: «Se han llevado a un grupo de exploradores hacia las xenoruinas. Creo que han decidido atacar su base».

languages.text: "Sie sind mit einer Gruppe von Spähern zu den Xenoruinen aufgebrochen. Ich denke, sie haben beschlossen, ihre Basis anzugreifen."
languages.original_text: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."

traits.locale_text: "Sie sind mit einer Gruppe von Spähern zu den Xenoruinen aufgebrochen. Ich denke, sie haben beschlossen, ihre Basis anzugreifen."

languages.text: 「彼らはスカウトのグループを連れて、異星遺跡に向かっている。彼らの基地を攻撃するつもりだろう。」
languages.original_text: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."

traits.locale_text: 「彼らはスカウトのグループを連れて、異星遺跡に向かっている。彼らの基地を攻撃するつもりだろう。」
